'''Tlarik''' was a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] student at the [[Syndic Mitth'raw'nuruodo training academy]]. Tlarik was assigned to collect weapons during the [[Battle of Rhigar|attack]] on the academy.

==Appearances==
*{{GamerCite|7|Red Sky, Blue Flame}} {{1st}}
